title: Exceptions, Cleanup, and Context Managers · Behavior Case: Python Domain Exceptions
summary: Make the resource inventory survive invalid records, unavailable files, and partial operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python domain exceptions increment in a failure-resilient inventory importer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define small domain-specific exception types only when callers need a meaningful recovery distinction.
Raise meaningful exceptions and preserve or suppress causes deliberately with exception chaining syntax.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
